## Summary

Describe the spec or decision in one short paragraph.

## Related issue

Link the issue here using a plain reference such as `Refs #123`.
Do not use closing keywords in this repository.

## Files changed

List the actual spec or ADR files changed in this PR.

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Problem and scope are clear
- [ ] Non-goals are explicit
- [ ] Risks and tradeoffs are documented
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable
- [ ] Open questions are called out
- [ ] Linked issue should remain open after this PR merges
- [ ] If this PR adds a spec, merging it should make implementation safe to start automatically
- [ ] Catalogs are updated if specs or ADRs were added, replaced, or superseded

## Follow-up expected after merge

List implementation repo, additional ADRs, or rollout work if known.
